case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS AGUIRRE, JOAQUIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, JOAQUIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
